assessment.note: Describes a lack of stretch and engagement in current tasks, indicating a mild disengagement.

new_queue.label: Recognition landing
new_queue.name: Did the recognition for the refactor feel right for you?
new_queue.description: Explores if the recognition for the refactor was satisfying.

new_queue.label: Mentoring vision
new_queue.name: What would you like mentoring to look like in your role?
new_queue.description: Explores Priya's vision for mentoring within her current role.

new_queue.label: Opening pace check
new_queue.name: How's the last two weeks actually felt — energy-wise?
new_queue.description: Opener that invites a real answer rather than 'fine'. Reads wellbeing directly.

new_queue.label: Next steps priority

new_queue.description: Encourages Priya to clarify her immediate priorities.
